AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • WasmScopeAbiImports

    Interface WasmScopeAbiImports

    Imports exposed to a language-neutral Wasm client.

    interface WasmScopeAbiImports {
        buffer_free(bufferHandle: number): void;
        buffer_len(bufferHandle: number): number;
        buffer_ptr(bufferHandle: number): number;
        error_clear(): void;
        error_code(): WasmAbiErrorCode;
        scope_apply(
            scopeHandle: number,
            transactionPtr: number,
            transactionLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_delete(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
        scope_get(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
        scope_get_binary(
            scopeHandle: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_resolve(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number;
        scope_set(
            scopeHandle: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
            valuePtr: number,
            valueLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_set_binary(
            scopeHandle: number,
            pathPtr: number,
            pathLen: number,
            valuePtr: number,
            valueLen: number,
            optionsPtr: number,
            optionsLen: number,
        ): number;
        scope_sync(scopeHandle: number): number;
        scope_unbind(scopeHandle: number): number;
        scope_unwatch(watchHandle: number): number;
        scope_watch(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number;
    }
    Index

    Methods

    buffer_free buffer_len buffer_ptr error_clear error_code scope_apply scope_delete scope_get scope_get_binary scope_resolve scope_set scope_set_binary scope_sync scope_unbind scope_unwatch scope_watch

    Methods

    buffer_free

    • buffer_free(bufferHandle: number): void

      Releases a host-owned result buffer and its guest-memory allocation.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns void

    buffer_len

    • buffer_len(bufferHandle: number): number

      Returns the byte length for a host-owned result buffer.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns number

    buffer_ptr

    • buffer_ptr(bufferHandle: number): number

      Returns the guest pointer for a host-owned result buffer.

      Parameters

      • bufferHandle: number

      Returns number

    error_clear

    • error_clear(): void

      Clears the last guest-call failure.

      Returns void

    error_code

    • error_code(): WasmAbiErrorCode

      Returns the last machine-readable guest-call failure.

      Returns WasmAbiErrorCode

    scope_apply

    • scope_apply(
          scopeHandle: number,
          transactionPtr: number,
          transactionLen: number,
      ): number

      Applies an atomic JSON transaction. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • transactionPtr: number
      • transactionLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_delete

    • scope_delete(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Deletes a scope path. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_get

    • scope_get(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Returns a host-owned result buffer handle containing JSON for a scope path.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_get_binary

    • scope_get_binary(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Returns a host-owned result buffer containing raw bytes for a scope path.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_resolve

    • scope_resolve(namePtr: number, nameLen: number): number

      Resolves a scope name to a numeric scope handle.

      Parameters

      • namePtr: number
      • nameLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_set

    • scope_set(
          scopeHandle: number,
          pathPtr: number,
          pathLen: number,
          valuePtr: number,
          valueLen: number,
      ): number

      Writes a JSON payload into a scope path. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number
      • valuePtr: number
      • valueLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_set_binary

    • scope_set_binary(
          scopeHandle: number,
          pathPtr: number,
          pathLen: number,
          valuePtr: number,
          valueLen: number,
          optionsPtr: number,
          optionsLen: number,
      ): number

      Writes raw bytes and JSON-encoded write options into a scope path.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number
      • valuePtr: number
      • valueLen: number
      • optionsPtr: number
      • optionsLen: number

      Returns number

    scope_sync

    • scope_sync(scopeHandle: number): number

      Runs queued Wasm scope bridge callbacks. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_unbind

    • scope_unbind(scopeHandle: number): number

      Unbinds a scope handle without destroying the AngularTS scope.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_unwatch

    • scope_unwatch(watchHandle: number): number

      Removes a watch handle. Returns 1 on success.

      Parameters

      • watchHandle: number

      Returns number

    scope_watch

    • scope_watch(scopeHandle: number, pathPtr: number, pathLen: number): number

      Watches a scope path and returns a watch handle.

      Parameters

      • scopeHandle: number
      • pathPtr: number
      • pathLen: number

      Returns number
